text: Tenant shall forfeit entire security deposit for any delay in rent beyond 2 days. Landlord may enter premises at any time without notice.
Tenant waives right to challenge eviction in any court. Subletting prohibited with penalty equal to 12 months rent.
Standard 11-month agreement with 2 months notice on either side and deposit refund within 30 days.
Lock-in period 36 months. Tenant liable for full remaining rent if leaving early.
Rent increase 20% every 6 months at landlord discretion without cap.
Agreement not registered. Lease term 24 months.
Tenant responsible for all structural repairs and property tax.
Fair terms: 1 month deposit, 1 month notice, painting shared equally.
Liquidated damages equal to 12 months rent for any breach including late payment.
Landlord may terminate without cause with 7 days notice. Tenant needs 6 months notice.
Stamp duty paid. Registered lease. Balanced maintenance clause.
Tenant pays brokerage, stamp, registration, and renovation before occupancy.
Dispute resolution only through landlord-appointed arbitrator.
Normal clause: pets allowed with deposit. Guests up to 2 weeks.
Forfeit full deposit if keys returned 1 day late at move-out.
